sections.title: Use of Let's — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Let's — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Use of Let's is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Let's + base verb (used for suggestions, includes the speaker). Rules: 'Let's' is short for 'Let us' and is used to make suggestions | Always followed by the base form of a verb (no 'to') | Negative: Let's not + base verb | Used when the speaker includes themselves in the action
sections.formula: Let's + base verb (used for suggestions, includes the speaker)

examples.hindi: चलो इस पर बात करते हैं।

sections.title: Use of Let's — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Let's — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Here are everyday sentences using Use of Let's that you will use in daily conversation, at home, and with friends.
sections.formula: Let's + base verb (used for suggestions, includes the speaker)

examples.hindi: चलो एक साथ काम करते हैं।

sections.title: Use of Let's — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Let's — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Use of Let's in professional and office contexts so you can use it confidently at work.
sections.formula: Let's + base verb (used for suggestions, includes the speaker)

examples.hindi: चलो इस समस्या को हल करते हैं।

sections.title: Use of Let's — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Use of Let's — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: Learn how to make negative sentences and questions using Use of Let's. Common mistakes: forgetting to keep the base verb form, or wrong subject agreement.
sections.formula: Let's + base verb (used for suggestions, includes the speaker)

examples.hindi: चलो एक दूसरे की मदद करते हैं।
